name: Yuhuan

skills.name: Poignant Melodies
skills.description:
Changes the melody to produce different skill effects.
War: Skills deal damage to nearby enemies.
Peace: Skills heal nearby allies.

skills.name: Tragic Beauty
skills.description: Damages and slows nearby targets. Her next Basic Attack will deal more damage.

skills.name: Mournful Tempo
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed, and after a brief delay, inflicts damage and stun on enemies in the target area.

skills.name: Melody of Peace
skills.description: Changes the melody to Peace, in which skills restore Health to nearby allies.

tips: Yuhuan is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.6% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Scepter of Reverberation → Boots of Tranquility → Staves of Sorcery → Savant's Wrath.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Yuhuan's Mage kit. Take Heal & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Tragic Beauty → Mournful Tempo → Melody of Peace → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Yuhuan excels into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Wukong. Avoid blind picking into Luna, Ying without team peel.
Yuhuan sits at Tier B globally (50.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Yuhuan good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Yuhuan is Tier B Mage with 50.6% win rate, 0.5% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Yuhuan build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of Tranquility, Staves of Sorcery, tome of wisdom, Savant's Wrath, ardent dominator. Run Nightmare arcana with Heal & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Yuhuan?
faqs.answer: Pick Luna, Ying into Yuhuan. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Yuhuan completes core items. Yuhuan struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Yuhuan counter?
faqs.answer: Yuhuan is strong into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Wukong according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Yuhuan when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Yuhuan good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Yuhuan sits at Tier B globally (50.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Yuhuan play?
faqs.answer: Yuhuan is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Yuhuan?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Heal & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Yuhuan or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Yuhuan vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Yuhuan when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Yuhuan?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Mage picks unless targeting a one-trick.
